sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_reinterpret (id UInt32, value DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_reinterpret SET value = toDateTime('1970-01-01 01:01:10') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT reinterpretAsString(255) AS byte_representation, reinterpretAsString(toDate('1970-03-07')) AS date_representation;
